label: Candidate
description: A newly collected item that may be relevant for a future defensive card.

label: High priority candidate
description: A candidate with stronger urgency due to potential impact on developer safety.

label: Maybe relevant
description: A weak or partial signal that may become relevant after more context is gathered.

label: Needs verification
description: A possible signal that requires stronger source confirmation before being treated as a card.

label: Rejected
description: An item determined to be out of scope, unreliable, or unsafe to publish.

label: Published
description: A validated candidate that has been converted into a public-safe what-to-avoid card.

label: Updated
description: A published card that received a substantive defensive update from new information.
